ksa_text: Knowledge of AI data governance requirements, including training data provenance tracking, representativeness assessment, annotation governance, data quality standards for regulatory compliance, and the relationship between training data characteristics and AI system equity outcomes.

ddat.top_element_label: Applied maths, statistics and scientific practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-K-012 (AI Governance/Knowledge) scores 0.457 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.457) and is edge_case for the ISO 8000 Data Manager role. Domain prior: out. Core signal hits: 3. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level ISO 8000 Data Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include decision rests on NIST AI RMF signal (0.457) for a AI Governance domain KSA with out-of-scope prior. NIST AI RMF inflates scores for governance/risk content systematically.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. NIST AI RMF alignment on AI Governance reflects semantic co-occurrence with governance frameworks, not ISO 8000 Data Manager work. Consistent treatment requires exclusion. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA for ISO 8000 Data Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance competencies do not appear as ISO 8000 Data Manager requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. AI Governance is not a ISO 8000 Data Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Overturned to exclude. NIST AI RMF alignment on AI Governance reflects semantic co-occurrence with governance frameworks, not ISO 8000 Data Manager work. Consistent treatment requires exclusion. Revised to exclude.
